kennelTipLean.note: Most of the Kennel reckons we're cooked, but there's a stubborn pocket calling 50+ and 100+ point wins like it's therapy.

kennelTipQuotes.quote: you underestimate the talent of the dogs, dogs 100 plus

debates.question: Salmon's named at 13 — does he start the game at lock?
debates.kennel: GAMEDAY thread is begging Ciro to bench him: 'bare minimum, get Salmon out of the starting line up'.

options.label: No, Burton shifts to lock and Salmon goes bench
No, late change — Salmon out of the 17

debates.question: Which edge do the Dogs target most in the first 20 minutes?
debates.kennel: Recruitment thread reckons we've got no go-forward and Critta will do a nudie run by year end — so where do we even attack?

options.label: Through the middle — Galvin/Burton kicking game

trivia.question: When did the Bulldogs last win an NRL premiership?
trivia.explainer: Steve Folkes' Dogs beat the Roosters 16-13 in the 2004 GF — and yes, that's now over two decades ago.

recap.question: Who racked up the most run metres for the Dogs against the Cowboys?
recap.explainer: Sua led the Dogs with 183m — and now he's signed with the Bears, because of course he has.

washup.headline: 12-28 and the wheels are properly off.
washup.vibe: Galvin opened the scoring and we led early, then completely fell apart — 28 unanswered with the Cowboys piling on three in the last 15. Sit 12th, just lost Sua to Perth, and the fan pages are openly calling for Ciro AND Gus. This isn't a slump anymore, it's a season.
washup.kennelSummary: The Ciraldo sack thread cracked 964 replies — moving Galvin to centre while up 6 has been pinpointed as the moment the season died. Gus is catching strays too, with five years of GM misses now under the microscope. Recruitment thread is comparing us position-by-position to the Roosters and finding zero matches.

kennelHotTakes.quote: Five years as GM, we enter a so-called premiership window with no 9, no 1, no speed at all — all we have is Preston.
kennelHotTakes.author: liljohny

kennelThreadsThisWeek.title: Rnd 10 Vs Dolphins Thurs 7:50pm @ Suncorp
kennelThreadsThisWeek.summary: Lineup tipping has gone full fantasy mode — everyone's posting their dream 17 and the consensus is just 'get Salmon out of the starting side, please Ciro, anything'.

kennelThreadsThisWeek.title: Early whispers
kennelThreadsThisWeek.summary: Issa87 dropped a wild rumour about Burton shifting to lock, Crichton to fullback and Tracey to wing. The thread instantly turned on him — 'Chinese whispers' and 'whispering to yourself' were the kinder responses.

kennelThreadsLastGame.title: Ciraldo should be sacked tonight
kennelThreadsLastGame.summary: AlzzBulldog leading the charge — moving Galvin to centre while up 6 has people frothing. 964 replies of 'sack him', with Gus also catching shrapnel for five years of recruitment misses.

kennelThreadsLastGame.title: Recruitment
kennelThreadsLastGame.summary: Brutal autopsy of the roster — $2.5m on three centres, no recognised hooker, and the Roosters' 1-13 getting held up as the benchmark we're nowhere near.

kennelThreadsLastGame.title: Sua to Perth 4 yr deal
kennelThreadsLastGame.summary: Sua gone to the Bears on 4 years and the Kennel is filthy — 'outplayed all our backs and they don't see any value', while we apparently keep 'Floptoya' instead.
